name: LG_UPDATE_ORDTRANS_223_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATE_ORDTRANS_223_01
       @LINETYPE       SMALLINT,
       @STOCKREF       INT,
       @VARIANTREF     INT,
       @AMOUNT        FLOAT,
       @SHIPPEDAMOUNT   FLOAT,
       @UINFO1          FLOAT,
       @UINFO2          FLOAT,
       @DT            DATETIME,
       @DORESERVE       SMALLINT,
       @RESERVEDT       DATETIME,
       @CLOSED          SMALLINT,
       @STATUS        SMALLINT,
       @TRCODE        SMALLINT,
       @SOURCEINDEX     SMALLINT,
       @OFFTRREF        INT,
       @OFFREF          INT,
       @PREVLNREF       INT,
       @DETLN           SMALLINT,
       @PREVLNNO        SMALLINT,
       @COEF          SMALLINT,
       @DEVIR          SMALLINT   AS
DECLARE @VALID       SMALLINT
DECLARE @UPDOFFTR    SMALLINT
DECLARE @UPDRESACCPARAM   SMALLINT
DECLARE @STATUSVAL        VARCHAR(101)
DECLARE @NEWLREF     INT
DECLARE @CAMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @CSHIPPED    FLOAT
DECLARE @ADDAMNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @DIFF        FLOAT
DECLARE @ORDERED     FLOAT
DECLARE @EPSILON     FLOAT
DECLARE @STRANS      SMALLINT
DECLARE @PROMOTION   SMALLINT
DECLARE @COMPOSITE   SMALLINT
DECLARE @SERVICE     SMALLINT
DECLARE @LCLASS      SMALLINT
DECLARE @CFACT       FLOAT
DECLARE @UINFO1OFF     FLOAT
DECLARE @UINFO2OFF     FLOAT
DECLARE @CFACT2       FLOAT
DECLARE @LOPTION SMALLINT
SELECT @EPSILON   = 0.0000001,
       @STRANS    = 0,
       @PROMOTION = 1,
       @SERVICE   = 4,
       @COMPOSITE = 6,
       @LCLASS    = 10,
       @UINFO1OFF = 1,
       @UINFO2OFF = 1,
       @LOPTION   = 9
IF @OFFTRREF <> 0
 SELECT @UINFO1OFF=UINFO1, @UINFO2OFF=UINFO2
 FROM LG_223_PURCHOFFERLN
 WHERE (LOGICALREF = @OFFTRREF)
DECLARE @FRMNR          INT
SELECT  @FRMNR        = CAST('223' AS SMALLINT)
SELECT @VALID = 0
IF ((@STATUS <> 1) AND
   ((@LINETYPE = @STRANS) OR (@LINETYPE = @PROMOTION) OR (@LINETYPE = @LOPTION) OR
    (@LINETYPE = @COMPOSITE) OR (@LINETYPE = @SERVICE) OR (@LINETYPE = @LCLASS)) AND
   (@STOCKREF <> 0) AND (ABS(@AMOUNT) > @EPSILON))
  SELECT @VALID = 1
SELECT @UPDOFFTR = 0
IF (((@LINETYPE = @STRANS) OR (@LINETYPE = @PROMOTION) OR (@LINETYPE = @LOPTION) OR
     (@LINETYPE = @COMPOSITE) OR (@LINETYPE = @SERVICE) OR (@LINETYPE = @LCLASS)) AND
    (@STOCKREF <> 0) AND (@AMOUNT > @EPSILON) AND (@OFFTRREF <> 0) AND (@OFFTRREF IS NOT NULL))
  SELECT @UPDOFFTR = 1
SELECT @STATUSVAL = VALUE FROM "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
WHERE FIRMNR = @FRMNR AND CODE='SALES_SORDRESERVESTAT'
SELECT @UPDRESACCPARAM = 0
IF (((@LINETYPE = @STRANS) OR (@LINETYPE = @PROMOTION) OR (@LINETYPE = @LOPTION) OR
     (@LINETYPE = @COMPOSITE) OR (@LINETYPE = @SERVICE) OR (@LINETYPE = @LCLASS)) AND
    (@STOCKREF <> 0) AND (@AMOUNT > @EPSILON) AND
    (((LTRIM(@STATUSVAL) = '1') AND (@STATUS = 1)) OR
     ((LTRIM(@STATUSVAL) = '256') AND (@STATUS = 2)) OR
     ((LTRIM(@STATUSVAL) = '257') )))
  SELECT @UPDRESACCPARAM = 1
IF ((@VALID = 1) OR (@UPDOFFTR = 1) OR (@UPDRESACCPARAM = 1)) AND (@AMOUNT > @EPSILON)
  BEGIN EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @UINFO1, @UINFO2, @CFACT OUTPUT
        EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @UINFO2OFF, @UINFO1OFF, @CFACT2 OUTPUT
        SELECT @CAMOUNT = @AMOUNT * @CFACT
        SELECT @CSHIPPED = @SHIPPEDAMOUNT * @CFACT
        IF (@CLOSED = 1)
          BEGIN
                IF (@CSHIPPED<=@CAMOUNT)
                   BEGIN
                        SELECT @ADDAMNT = @COEF * @CSHIPPED
                   END
                ELSE
                   BEGIN
                        SELECT @ADDAMNT = @COEF * @CAMOUNT
                   END
          END
        ELSE
          BEGIN SELECT @ADDAMNT = @COEF * @CAMOUNT
          END
  END
IF (@UPDOFFTR = 1) AND (@DEVIR <> 1)
  BEGIN IF (@LINETYPE <> @LCLASS) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_PURCHOFFERLN WHERE LOGICALREF = @OFFTRREF AND STOCKREF = @STOCKREF)
            UPDATE LG_223_PURCHOFFERLN
            SET ORDEREDAMOUNT = ORDEREDAMOUNT + @ADDAMNT * @CFACT2
            WHERE (LOGICALREF = @OFFTRREF) AND (STOCKREF = @STOCKREF)
        IF (@DETLN = 1) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_PURCHOFFERLN WHERE LOGICALREF = @OFFTRREF AND STOCKREF = @STOCKREF)
          BEGIN SELECT @OFFREF = ORDFICHEREF, @PREVLNREF = PREVLINEREF, @PREVLNNO = PREVLINENO
                  FROM LG_223_PURCHOFFERLN
                 WHERE (LOGICALREF = @OFFTRREF)
                IF (@OFFREF <> 0) AND (@PREVLNREF <> 0) AND (@PREVLNNO <> 0)
                   UPDATE LG_223_PURCHOFFERLN
                   SET ORDEREDAMOUNT = ORDEREDAMOUNT + @ADDAMNT * @CFACT2
                   WHERE (ORDFICHEREF = @OFFREF) AND
                         (LINENO_     = @PREVLNNO) AND
                         (STOCKREF    = @PREVLNREF) AND
                         (DETLINE     = 0)
          END
  END
